shared_properties: The asset reuses the package palette and art deco trim language established by the tower tileset and scale rig.
All frames and ladder segments are authored for transparent-background compositing inside the fixed orthographic camera.
Module sizing stays aligned to the 16 px grid used by world placement and climb logic.
differences: This set combines animated goal-door states with static ladder modules because both belong to room-to-room progression readability.
The unlock animation carries the brightest gold motion in the world layer outside the beam system.
Ladder pieces remain intentionally simple so the player climb path stays readable behind the moving character silhouette.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the shadow survival loop, mirror and prism puzzle rules, scale targets, HUD placements, and Bevy runtime constraints for Umbra Scale.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the twilight art deco tower mood, silhouette contrast, gold trims, and hard-edge lighting style.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load exit_door_ladder_set.png during Loading and expose atlas slices for door closed, unlock, open, ladder cap, ladder body, and ladder base elements.
runtime_notes: Door animation should trigger from balance-goal events while ladder segments stay static and tile-aligned.
Keep the door opening frames centered on the same hinge line so gameplay collision swaps do not appear to jump.
Ladder rungs must tile cleanly with the tower grid and stay visible against both shadow and lit wall sections.

context.usage: Used for level exits, unlock feedback, and the climbable ladder surfaces that connect stacked tower rooms.

readability_notes: The door silhouette reads as the highest-priority goal object on the floor even before it unlocks.
Ladder rails stay darker than the door trim so the exit remains the focal point.
Rung spacing stays even across repeated body segments.

acceptance_criteria: Atlas canvas is exactly 384x192 px for eight 96x96 frames with no frame gutter.
The door hinge line stays fixed across every opening frame.
Ladder rung spacing remains exactly 16 px center-to-center for seamless stacking.
